item.title: [Latent Space] 🔬There Is No AlphaFold for Materials — AI for Materials Discovery with Heather Kulik
item.description: There's a school of thought that why should I bother to learn chemistry or physics or whatever when TAGPT know has PhD level understanding of that. Anyway, [music] >> Chach GPT is super good at Wikipedia level chemistry knowledge. I'm really interested in molecular design. Like how do you find a new liant that can go into a transition metal complex? So what that means is [music] it's some combination of atoms and it's going to bind to the metal and it's going to change its properties. The [music...
